entry.content: • Added gcloud beta ai semantic-governance-policy-engine deprovision command to tear down a semantic governance policy engine, including its tenant project, GKE cluster, and PSC service attachments.
entry.summary: A new command, `gcloud beta ai semantic-governance-policy-engine deprovision`, has been added. This command allows you to tear down a semantic governance policy engine and its associated resources, such as the tenant project, GKE cluster, and PSC service attachments.
entry.title: AI Platform: Deprovision Semantic Governance Policy Engine

entry.summary: New commands for managing IAM policies for agent identities are now available. You can use these commands to get, set, add, remove, and test IAM permissions for your agents.
entry.title: Agent Identity: Agent Identity IAM Commands

entry.content: • Added gcloud agent-registry command group to manage Agent Registry resources.
entry.summary: A new command group, `gcloud agent-registry`, is now available for managing Agent Registry resources. This allows for streamlined control and configuration of your agents directly from the command line.
entry.title: Agent Registry: Manage Agent Registry Resources

entry.content: • Made gcloud container backup-restore command groups compatible with non-default universe domains.
entry.summary: The `gcloud container backup-restore` command groups have been updated to support non-default universe domains. This enhancement improves flexibility for users managing backups in diverse cloud environments.
entry.title: Backup For GKE: Backup and Restore Command Compatibility

entry.content:
• Fixed a bug where stderr messages from gcloud CLI output would be printed to stdout.
  • Added --gcloud_config_cache flag to enable caching data retrieved from the gcloud CLI.
  • Added display of container request concurrency of BigQuery Python UDF in bq show --routine.
  • Added information about AI Agent in the execution environment to the user-agent HTTP header in the API request.
entry.summary: Several enhancements have been made to BigQuery, including bug fixes for `gcloud` CLI output, added caching capabilities for the `gcloud` CLI, and improved visibility into BigQuery Python UDFs and API requests. These updates aim to provide a more robust and informative user experience.
entry.title: BigQuery: BigQuery improvements

entry.content: • Added Regional Endpoints (REP) support for all Datastream commands.
entry.summary: Cloud Datastream now supports Regional Endpoints (REP) for all its commands. This enhancement improves data replication efficiency and reliability by allowing operations to be performed within specific geographic regions. Users can now leverage REP for enhanced control and performance in their data streaming pipelines.
entry.title: Cloud Datastream: Datastream Adds Regional Endpoint Support

entry.content:
• Added --zone-distribution-config-zones flag to gcloud memorystore instances create command. This flag lets users specify multiple zones when they create a MULTI_ZONE cluster.
  • Added --zone-distribution-config-zones flag to gcloud redis clusters create command. This flag lets users specify multiple zones when they create a MULTI_ZONE cluster.
entry.summary: You can now create multi-zone Redis clusters using the `gcloud memorystore instances create` and `gcloud redis clusters create` commands. The new `--zone-distribution-config-zones` flag allows you to specify multiple zones for your cluster during creation.
entry.title: Cloud Memorystore: Create multi-zone Redis clusters

entry.content: • Added support for creating clusters using --quickstart-cluster in gcloud beta cluster-director clusters create.
entry.summary: Easily create clusters with the new --quickstart-cluster option in gcloud beta cluster-director clusters create. This simplifies the cluster creation process for quick setups and testing.
entry.title: Cluster Director: Cluster Director Quickstart

entry.content: • Added Hyperdisk options to --disk-type of gcloud colab runtime-templates create: HYPERDISK_BALANCED.
entry.summary: You can now choose Hyperdisk balanced storage for your Colab runtimes. This option is available through the `--disk-type` flag when creating new runtimes using `gcloud colab runtime-templates create`, with `HYPERDISK_BALANCED` as the new value.
entry.title: Colab: New Colab disk options available

entry.content:
• Fixed an issue where gcloud compute url-maps import reset custom timeout and retryPolicy (specifically numRetries) values to defaults when updating an existing URL map.
  • Added --vsock-mode flag to gcloud compute instances create, gcloud compute instance-templates create, gcloud compute instances bulk create, and gcloud compute queued-resources create in ALPHA to support enabling/disabling VSOCK mode.
  • Promoted --purpose flag to gcloud compute public-delegated-prefixes create in beta.
entry.summary: The latest Compute Engine command-line tool updates include fixes for URL map configurations and the addition of a new VSOCK mode flag. Additionally, the `--purpose` flag for public delegated prefixes has been promoted to beta.
entry.title: Compute Engine: Compute Engine CLI Updates

entry.content: • Added Regional Endpoints (REP) support for all Database Migration Service (DMS) commands.
entry.summary: Regional endpoints are now supported for all database migration commands. This update improves flexibility and control over your migration processes.
entry.title: Database Migration: Database Migration Service Enhancements

entry.content:
• Updated default kubectl from 1.35.3 to 1.35.6.
  • Added new kubectl version 1.36.2 for the RAPID channel.
  • Additional kubectl versions:
  • kubectl.1.30 (1.30.14)
  • kubectl.1.31 (1.31.14)
  • kubectl.1.32 (1.32.13)
  • kubectl.1.33 (1.33.13)
  • kubectl.1.34 (1.34.9)
  • kubectl.1.35 (1.35.6)
  • kubectl.1.36 (1.36.2)
entry.summary: We've updated the default kubectl version to 1.35.6 and added 1.36.2 to the RAPID channel. Several other kubectl versions are also available, including 1.30 through 1.36. This ensures you have access to the latest features and bug fixes for managing your Kubernetes clusters.
entry.title: Kubernetes Engine: Kubernetes Engine kubectl updates

entry.content:
• Promoted gcloud network-security ull-mirroring-engines and gcloud network-security ull-mirroring-collectors commands to beta.
  • Promoted gcloud network-security ull-mirroring-engines and gcloud network-security ull-mirroring-collectors commands to GA.

Subscribe to these release notes at https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/google-cloud-sdk-announce.
entry.summary: Key commands for network traffic mirroring have been promoted to General Availability. These tools enable enhanced network security monitoring and analysis.
entry.title: Network Security: Network mirroring tools reach GA
